name: Blackberry Ridge Golf Club
about: Blackberry Ridge Golf Club is a multi-venue facility featuring an 18-hole public golf course, a state-of-the-art golf academy with TrackMan technology, and a golf simulator bay available for off-season practice and events. The venue offers a blend of on-course play, year-round instruction, and high-tech simulation in a climate-controlled setting. It also includes a full-service restaurant, Grill19, and space for weddings and special events, providing a comprehensive golf and dining experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology for data-driven swing analysis
Year-round indoor practice available regardless of weather
On-site dining at Grill19 for a complete experience
Professional instruction and custom club fitting services
Multiple bays and technology for different practice needs

food_and_drink.notes: Full dining service available at Grill19 with local and fresh food options.
Bar service available on-site at Grill19.

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade launch monitor used for lessons, fittings, and simulator sessions.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your own clubs, but the facility also offers rental clubs for convenience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned, but the venue offers a full-service restaurant, Grill19, with food and beverage options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Information on simulator time for 18 holes is not specified; it is recommended to contact the venue for details on session duration.

faq.question: Is the simulator kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is described as suitable for all ages and skill levels, making it kid-friendly.
